heading: Today
text: Some areas of dense valley fog burning off by mid-morning.  Mostly sunny and warmer.  A bit more humid this afternoon.  Highs ranging through the 80s.  Winds light, mainly west less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, mixing with a few clouds after midnight, especially through Quebec.  Mild.  Lows in the 60s, a few upper 50s northeast, near 70 in the broader valleys west.  Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Clouds through Quebec, otherwise partly sunny.  A rising chance of showers and thunderstorms in Quebec, increasing later in the day north of Rt. 4, extending south from the Green Mountains west.  Very warm to hot, and increasingly humid.  Highs in the 80s, a few warmer valleys approaching 90.  Light winds, mainly southwest less than 10 mph.
